(fn is_balanced s string -> bool

      ((eq c ")") (if (in stack "(") (pop stack) (ret false)))
      ((eq c "[") (push stack "["))
      ((eq c "]") (if (in stack "[") (pop stack) (ret false)))
      ((eq c "{") (push stack "{"))
